title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A tech news discussion covering concerns about excessive token consumption in AI deployments, with only 18% of tokens spent on shipped products. Topics include Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and ethical questions around AI service adoption.
